curves.source_reported_quantity: approximately -180 dB average PSD relative to 1 (m s^-2)^2 Hz^-1 from 1e-3 to 1e-1 Hz for iGrav015/iGrav032
curves.operating_conditions: Three-channel-correlation self-noise estimate for seven quiet days at J9 Strasbourg; environmental site noise is not represented.
curves.interpretation: Approximate flat anchor converted from the paper-reported PSD level.
curves.model_uncertainty_note: The source reports an average and frequency-dependent resonances; this is not a digitized site-noise curve.

curves.source_reported_quantity: 750 nm s^-2 Hz^-1/2; constant PSD reported from 5e-4 to 1e-2 Hz; longer timescales are not white noise
curves.operating_conditions: AQG-A01 Larzac field campaign at the reported 750 nm s^-2 Hz^-1/2 operating sensitivity.
curves.interpretation: Flat short-term white-noise anchor only over the explicitly reported plateau.
curves.model_uncertainty_note: Long-term instrumental drift, geophysical residuals and site-specific environmental noise remain outside this anchor.

curves.source_reported_quantity: 450 nm s^-2 Hz^-1/2; constant PSD reported from 5e-4 to 1e-2 Hz using an effective 36 s sampling interval
curves.operating_conditions: FG5#228 32-hour Larzac comparison with drops treated as continuous at the reported effective rate.
curves.interpretation: Flat short-term white-noise anchor only over the explicitly reported plateau.
curves.model_uncertainty_note: Dead time, site vibration, long-term effects and non-white behaviour remain outside this anchor.
